title: Totem Guard
description: Lock your offhand to only totems, and Renders highlights to never miss click something in your offhand.
body:
# Totem Guard: The Essential PvP Utility

Totem Guard is a lightweight, high-performance Fabric utility designed for competitive Minecraft PvP. Its primary goal is to minimize human error during high-stakes combat by automating offhand safety and providing instant visual clarity for your most important resources.

Built with a clean interface, it integrates seamlessly into your setup without cluttering your screen or distracting from the fight.

## Key Features

The "Totem Lock" System: The flagship feature. When enabled, Totem Guard monitors your offhand slot. It prevents non-totem items from accidentally being swapped into your offhand, ensuring that you are always protected by a Totem of Undying during critical moments.

Tactical Inventory Highlights: Stop squinting at your hotbar. Totem Guard applies high-contrast, color-coded glows to essential items within your inventory and hotbar:

**Cyan: Totems of Undying (Instant recognition when you're running low).**

**purple: Ender Pearls (Essential for tracking your mobility).**

**Bright Yellow: Golden Apples & Enchanted Gaps.**

**Emerald Green: Experience Bottles for quick mending.**

![Totem Guard Rendering](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e54324244073a83b98be7ea93679f45bef1c1fe7.png)

**Intelligent Offhand Management**: Works alongside your natural hotkeying. If you have a totem in your inventory, Totem Guard helps ensure it finds its way to your offhand when the slot is empty, acting as a secondary layer of defense.

**Minimalist Config HUD**: Accessed via Right Shift, the configuration menu allows you to toggle specific highlights or the Totem Lock on the fly. Each setting is saved instantly, so you never have to re-configure mid-match.

![Totem Guard Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d57129e0fc121dddad40bf462ea508f042c5d62.png)

### The Advantage

In modern PvP, a single accidental click can mean the difference between a win and a respawn screen. Totem Guard removes the "clutter" from your decision-making process. By locking your offhand to safety and highlighting your resources, it allows you to focus entirely on your movement and aim.
